mapper.insert: insert into talk (user_id, title, content, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
insert into cont (user_id, talk_id, content, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{talkId}, #{content}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select t.content from talk t left join user u on t.user_id=u.id where t.user_id=#{userId} and t.id=#{talkId}
select content from cont where user_id=#{userId} and talk_id=#{talkId} order by create_time, id
mapper.update:
update talk
content = #{content},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
